fields.summary: Provides options that control the generation of XPS documents.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKDocumentXpsOptions` contains the settings used when creating an XPS document via the SkiaSharp document API. Set <xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions.DPI> to control output resolution and <xref:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions.AllowNoPngs> to control PNG fallback behavior.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    DPI = 300,
    AllowNoPngs = false,
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether PNG images may be omitted from the output.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if PNG images may be omitted; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the resolution, in dots per inch, for the XPS document.
fields.value: The DPI resolution used for the XPS document.
